candidates.why: Direct cost-of-revenue / cost-of-sales line; matches property costs total and represents direct operating costs.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related component, but only populated in limited years and likely incomplete on its own.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Changed. Candidate list appears incomplete for overhead coverage. 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' is an explicit SG&A component but is sparse; 'Central administration' is a clear administrative overhead row present across years and better captures SG&A. Chose both to follow the SG&A hierarchy for a mostly empty explicit SG&A line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Central administration

candidates.why: Best match for reported interest expense; populated across years and preferable to broader finance cost lines.

Broader finance bucket and appears empty here; only a fallback if no interest line existed.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: REVIEWED. 'Interest Expenses' is the primary choice. Added 'Interest Expense' as an alternate label and 'Financial costs' as a fallback net finance-cost line because the candidate list omitted 'Financial costs', which is more appropriate than the empty 'Financial Expenses' if labels change over time. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Financial costs

candidates.why: Balancing line, not an equity balance to use for book equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list clearly misses the correct equity label. Chose 'Equity' from the Balance Sheet. There are two 'Equity' rows; the first one excludes minority interest in 2021 (11445.83 vs second 11518.9 with Minority Interest 72.1), so it is the preferred BE line to avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority interest stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
